# Project Status ‚ÄĒ Knowledge Base

<!-- Reset at extraction (2026-06-05). The parent project's knowledge base
     concerned lanes outside this subproject's scope. The review agent
     rebuilds this file from this subproject's own sessions. -->

## Knowledge Base

### Proof Patterns (reusable across targets)

- **Localized-monoidal synonym wiring (iter-004, SNAP, axiom-clean).** To get a symmetric monoidal
  structure on a localization `E` of a symmetric monoidal `D` (when a direct instance on `E` collides),
  instantiate Mathlib `CategoryTheory.LocalizedMonoidal L W őĶ`. Load-bearing engineering facts:
  (1) the bare presheaf-of-modules form does NOT synthesize `MonoidalCategory` ‚ÄĒ only the
  `PresheafOfModules (R ‚čô forget‚āā ‚Ä¶)` form does; add private `inferInstanceAs` re-export instances
  (`pshModMonoidal`/`Braided`/`Symmetric`). (2) `L`/`W` fed to `LocalizedMonoidal` must be the **literal**
  `PresheafOfModules.sheafification (ūĚüô ‚Ä¶)` / `inverseImage` class ‚ÄĒ wrapping in an `abbrev` (or
  domain-ascribing `L`) breaks the `IsLocalization` discr-tree key. (3) the synonym lives at `Type (u+1)`.
  (4) `őĶ` = `sheafificationCounitIso (unitModule X)` works because the unit module's underlying presheaf
  is the presheaf monoidal unit by `rfl`. (5) the only project obligation is `W.IsMonoidal`, got from the
  proved `ztensor_whisker_localIso` (whiskerRight) + braiding conjugation (whiskerLeft) via
  `isMonoidal_of_braided_whiskerRight`. CAVEAT: the synonym's `‚äó` is NOT defeq to a hand-built
  `sheafification.obj(F.toPr ‚äó_p G.toPr)` ‚ÄĒ transferring coherences needs explicit őľ-transport bridge
  lemmas (object iso `tensorObj F G ‚ČÖ F ‚äó_loc G`), not just `rw`.
- **Index-0 tensor-power rewriting (iter-004, SNAP).** `rw [show tensorPow L 0 = unitModule X from rfl]`
  FAILS "motive not type correct" (object in a dependent iso type); use a leading whole-goal
  `show ‚Ä¶ unitModule X ‚Ä¶` (defeq) BEFORE any `rw`. `eqToIso` Nat-reindexers close by `congr 1` (proof
  irrelevance); blind `simp [‚Üź eqToIso_trans]` hits max-recursion. `ő≤_{ūĚüô,ūĚüô}=ūĚüô` via
  `braiding_tensorUnit_left`+`MonoidalCategory.unitors_equal` then `sheafification.mapIso` = `Iso.refl`.
- **Crux-extraction to break a CHURNING monolith (iter-004, FBC).** When a frontier theorem churns
  (PARTIAL across iters, sorry won't shrink), move its post-`Iso.ext` residual into its own
  blueprint-pinned lemma and close the host by `exact <newlemma> args`. The host becomes sorry-free
  (transitively backed) AND the next prover gets a smaller named frontier target. The 2-categorical
  `pullback_spec_tilde_iso` naturality reduces via: `Iso.ext` ‚Üí `.hom` cleanup ‚Üí `Iso.eq_comp_inv` ‚Üí
  `pullbackPushforwardAdjunction.homEquiv.injective` ‚Üí `Adjunction.homEquiv_unit`; the deep tail is the
  per-leg identification of the dictionary's transpose with `gammaPushforwardNatIso` via
  `unit_conjugateEquiv` ‚ÄĒ effort-break it, don't re-run the monolith.
- **Per-chart base-change iso = `pullback_spec_tilde_iso` + reuse of `base_change_mate_regroupEquiv`, NOT bare
  `cancelBaseChange` (iter-003, FBC `baseChange_chart_tensorIso`, axiom-clean).** To build
  `őď(V_B,F_B) ‚ČÖ őď(V,F)‚äó_A B` on an affine chart `V=Spec R` over `A`: step1 reads `őď(V_B,F_B)‚ČÖ(R‚äó_AB)‚äó_RM`
  via `(restrictScalars includeRight).mapIso (moduleSpecőďFunctor.mapIso (pullback_spec_tilde_iso őĻ M) ‚Č™‚Čę
  (tilde.toTildeőďNatIso.app _).symm)`; step2 cancels the base change B-linearly to `B‚äó_AM` via
  `‚Č™‚Čę base_change_mate_regroupEquiv Ōą ŌÜ M`. TWO traps: (i) `tilde.toTildeőďNatIso.app N : N ‚ČÖ őď(tilde N)`
  so the unit needs `.symm`; (ii) `TensorProduct.AlgebraTensorModule.cancelBaseChange` does NOT apply
  directly to `(R‚äó_AB)‚äó_RM ‚Üí B‚äó_AM` (it cancels the *second* tensor arg and forces `[Algebra A B]`; no
  `R‚ÜíB` map exists) ‚ÄĒ route through `regroupEquiv`'s proved `comm ‚Čę cancelBaseChange ‚Čę comm`. Reuse (don't
  re-derive) the mate-region deliverable even though it sits below the use site.
- **`simp only [gMul_def]` unfolds nested graded-mult where positional `rw [gMul_def a b, ‚Ä¶]` FAILS (iter-003,
  SNAP `sectionsMul_mul_assoc`).** Positional `rw [gMul_def a b]` errors "Did not find an occurrence of
  `GMul.mul ?m ?b`" on a doubly-nested `GMul.mul (GMul.mul a b) c`; `simp only [gMul_def]` unfolds all
  occurrences at once. Braiding rewrites: `rw [‚Üź Hbraid]` on the goal FAILS (TensorProduct instance mismatch
  CommRing-base vs RingCat-base) ‚ÄĒ use `Hel.symm.trans (congrArg (sectionsMul G F).hom Hbraid)`;
  `erw [ModuleCat.MonoidalCategory.braiding_hom_apply]` raises a spurious `CommRing ringCatSheaf` synth
  failure ‚ÄĒ the braiding-on-tmul is just `rfl` after `rw [happ]`. The őľ-branch+section-core template
  (`rw [gMul_def, tensorPowAdd_<branch>, Iso.trans_hom]; show <N-app form>; sectionsCast_eqToIso_cancel;
  exact <section-core>`) reliably wires `sectionsMul_mul_one`/`_mul_comm` once the `tensorPowAdd_*` branch exists.
- **Adjunction-transpose section core ‚ÄĒ closes `őď(structural-iso)(ő∑(elementary tensor)) = ‚Ä¶` (iter-002,
  SNAP `unitor_sectionsMul`, the engine that closed `sectionsMul_one_mul` axiom-clean).** For a sheaf-of-
  modules structural iso built as `sheafification.map (presheaf-iso) ‚Čę counitIso` (unitor/associator/
  braiding), proving its `őď`-image sends the section multiplication `ő∑(x‚äóy)` to the expected value reduces
  to a transpose identity. Idiom: `have H := (adj.homEquiv _ _).apply_eq_iff_eq_symm_apply.mpr
  (Adjunction.homEquiv_counit adj _ _ _).symm` ‚ÄĒ the `homEquiv.symm` form **IS** the composite
  `map(presheaf-iso)^# ‚Čę őĶ`, and the `.mpr`'s defeq check silently absorbs `sheafification = adj.left` and
  `sheafificationCounitIso.hom = adj.counit.app G` (do NOT `rw [show ‚Ä¶ from rfl]` ‚ÄĒ it fails to match under
  `homEquiv`). Then `rw [Adjunction.homEquiv_unit] at H`; `congrArg (fun m => (m.app ‚ä§).hom (x‚äóy)) H`
  (annotate the lambda's morphism type); `exact Hel.trans Hunit`. The presheaf-iso value at `‚ä§` is pinned by
  a `happ := rfl` over the **CommRingCat** ring `X.sheaf.obj.obj ‚ä§` (NOT the RingCat `X.ringCatSheaf`), then
  `erw [ModuleCat.MonoidalCategory.leftUnitor_hom_apply, one_smul]`. GOTCHA: `Adjunction.homEquiv_counit`
  takes `(adj X Y g)` EXPLICITLY ‚ÄĒ `(Adjunction.homEquiv_counit).symm` fails. The braiding case is simpler
  (unit-naturality only, no counit/triangle). This SUPERSEDES the iter-001 `:= rfl` whnf-timeout dead end.
- **`show` (default transparency) splits `őď(f‚Čęg)(x)` AND realigns elements where `rw` can't (iter-002,
  SNAP `sectionsMul_one_mul` outer reduction).** Under the `tensorObj`/`sheafification.obj` diamond,
  positional `rw [SheafOfModules.comp_val, PresheafOfModules.comp_app]` binds `?x` at reducible
  transparency and fails ("Did not find pattern `(?f ‚Čę ?g).val`"); `rw [show tensorPow L 0 = unitModule X
  from rfl, ‚Ä¶]` on a unit index gives "motive is not type correct". FIX: a single `show` at default
  transparency that both splits the composite application `őď(A‚Č™‚ČęB)(s) = őď(B)(őď(A)(s))` and realigns the
  element to its `unitModule`/`(1:ring)` form; then `rw [sectionsCast_eqToIso_cancel]` cancels the reindex
  (proof-irrelevance makes `(zero_add n).symm` defeq the def's `(Nat.zero_add n).symm`). `val_app_top_comp`
  (term-mode `rfl`) is the standalone split lemma if needed.
- **FBC: wrap an `eqLocus` codomain in `ModuleCat.of <explicit groundRing carrier> (‚Ä¶)` (iter-002,
  `baseChange_sheafConditionFork_tensorIso` wiring).** Slotting a `‚ČÉ‚āó` whose codomain is a
  `LinearMap.eqLocus` (a `Submodule`) into a `(ModuleCat.restrictScalars ŌÜ).obj (‚Ä¶)` fails "failed to
  synthesize AddCommMonoid" if you write `ModuleCat.of _ (eqLocus ‚Ä¶)`; supply the carrier explicitly
  (`ModuleCat.of (groundRing (pullback X.toSpecőď (Spec.map ‚Ä¶))) (LinearMap.eqLocus ‚Ä¶)`).

- **Value-ModuleCat tmul-bilinearity diamond ‚ÄĒ `‚Üź map_add; congr 2; exact tmul_lemma` (iter-001, SNAP
  SectionGradedRing GSemiring fields).** The section graded mult is `őď(őľ)(sectionsMul (a ‚äó‚āú[CommRingCat ‚ÜĎ(X.sheaf.obj.obj ‚ä§)] b))`.
  The tmul scalar ring MUST be the **CommRingCat** carrier (only it has `CommSemiring`, needed by `TensorProduct`),
  but the `Module` instance on `sectionDeg L i` is keyed to the **RingCat** carrier (defeq, different keys). So
  standalone `TensorProduct.add_tmul/tmul_add/tmul_zero/zero_tmul` rewrites FAIL (`rw` leaves ring as `?m`; `simp only`
  "made no progress"; a `have` of the equality can't synth `Module (CommRingCat-ring) (sectionDeg L i)`). WORKING IDIOM:
  peel the two `ModuleCat.Hom.hom` maps with `‚Üź map_add`/`‚Üź map_zero`, then `congr 2`, then
  `exact TensorProduct.add_tmul a b c` (expected-type-driven elaboration binds the goal's bundled instances,
  sidestepping fresh synthesis). For zero fields, first expose RHS `0 = f (g 0)` via
  `conv_rhs => rw [‚Üź map_zero ‚Ä¶, ‚Üź map_zero ‚Ä¶]`. Closes all 4 bilinearity + 2 zero `GSemiring` fields. See [[snap-section-tmul-diamond]].
- **`ModuleCat.restrictScalars` FUNCTOR as B-linear transport when no scalar tower (iter-001, FBC
  `baseChangeEqLocusToPullbackGamma`).** To transport a `‚ČÉ‚āó[groundRing X']`-equiv `eX'` to `‚ČÉ‚āó[B]` when B acts only
  through a ring hom `ŌÜ = pullbackGroundRingAlg B` (so there is NO `IsScalarTower B (groundRing X') _` and
  `LinearEquiv.restrictScalars B` is "typeclass instance problem is stuck"): use the functor
  `((ModuleCat.restrictScalars ŌÜ).mapIso eX'.symm.toModuleIso).toLinearEquiv`. `ModuleCat.of R ‚ÜĎM` is defeq `M`, so
  no `ofSelfIso` (absent this pin) is needed ‚ÄĒ the `.toModuleIso ‚Čę restrictScalars`-functor route lands on the
  bundled object directly.
- **Base-changed cover `iSup = ‚ä§` via FORWARD `Opens.map_iSup` (iter-001, FBC).** `rw [‚Üź TopologicalSpace.Opens.map_iSup]`
  fails HO-matching the `‚ąė`-form. Instead: `have hmap := TopologicalSpace.Opens.map_iSup f.base U; rw [hU, TopologicalSpace.Opens.map_top] at hmap; exact hmap.symm`.
- **`:= rfl` split of `őď((A ‚Č™‚Čę B).hom)(s)` whnf-TIMEOUTS ‚ÄĒ do-not-retry (iter-001, SNAP `sectionsMul_one_mul`).**
  Stating `őď(A‚Č™‚ČęB)(s) = őď(B)(őď(A)(s))` at `.val.app ‚ä§` as `:= rfl` unfolds `tensorPowAdd`'s match through the whole
  sheafification composite ‚Üí `(deterministic) timeout at whnf` (200000 hb), build-verified. Use explicit
  `Iso.trans_hom` + `SheafOfModules.comp_val` (`Sheaf.lean:61`, rfl) + `NatTrans.comp_app` + term-mode ModuleCat
  comp-apply (the value-ModuleCat diamond). The companion `sectionsCast_eqToIso_cancel` (reindex cancellation) IS
  proven by `subst; rfl` and is reusable for all 4 coherence Eqs.

- **Triple-overlap C2 collapse via abstract-category folds (iter-080, GlueDescent keystone
  `glueChartComponent_leg_compat`).** The closing move for the conjugated-cocycle keystone: fold EACH leg of
  the fully-transposed component equation over the triple overlap `V_ipq` to a canonical N-factor `‚Čę`-chain
  (`map_fold‚āÖ` = 5-factor functor-image fold stated in abstract categories, applied by unification;
  `side_collapse_left/right`), then discharge the whole equality by the SINGLE C2 cocycle hypothesis:
  `exact hL.trans ((final_cancel hC2h hcc hbb haa).trans hR.symm)`. Sequence intermediate regroupings with
  `reassoc_of%` / `‚Üź reassoc_of%`. Pair-level triangle step = `glueChartComponent_overlap_collapse`
  (`dsimp only [glueChartComponent]; simp only [Category.assoc, Iso.inv_hom_id, Category.comp_id]; rfl`).
  Under the X.Modules diamond, positional `rw` on the composite first-leg regroup fails (`Did not find an
  occurrence of R‚āĀ ‚Čę R‚āā ‚Čę R‚āÉ ‚Čę R‚āĄ`) and `whnf` heartbeat-200000 timeouts appear mid-search ‚ÄĒ use the
  solved-form fold lemmas + `erw` for comp-node patterns. Realized `isIso_glueRestrictionHom` /
  `glueRestrictionIso` at 0 sorry. Consumes the [[Pair‚Üítriple verbatim transcription]] toolkit.
- **Pair‚Üítriple verbatim transcription (iter-079, GlueDescent triple-overlap toolkit).** Build a
  triple-overlap lemma family by copying the existing pair-level proofs verbatim under the substitution
  `őĻ_j ‚Ü¶ f_pq ‚Čę őĻ_p`, `t_ij ‚Čę f_ji ‚Ü¶ ŌĄ`, `f_ij ‚Ü¶ q` (`ŌĄ = t'_ipq ‚Čę fst`, `q = fst ‚Čę f_ip`). ~13 lemmas
  (`glueData_triple_square`, `glueData_preimage_image_eq‚āÉ`, `glueTripleBaseChangeIso`,
  `glueTripleFactor_transpose/_mate`, `glueLegA/B_component_transpose`) compiled first/second try this way.
  `_app_app` iso-lemmas close by `ext x; rfl`. `glueData_preimage_image_eq‚āÉ` needs `őĻ_eq_iff` applied
  TWICE (at (i,p) AND (i,q)) ‚ÄĒ the second certifies the lift point is in `range fst`.
- **Post-`rw` X.Modules diamond escape (iter-079, recurs in BOTH GlueDescent + GrassmannianQuot).** After
  ANY `rw` under the `X.Modules`/composite-functor diamond, `simp only [Category.assoc]` makes NO progress
  (comp nodes acquire mixed-provenance instances) and bare `inv`/`infer_instance` fail to synthesize even
  when the `IsIso` is a same-lemma binder/`haveI`. Go term-mode: `congrArg (¬∑ ‚Čę g) h` for a calc step (`rw`'s
  closing `rfl` is reducible-transparency and misses proof-irrelevant/instance-path hidden args);
  `@CategoryTheory.inv _ _ _ _ (...) hinst` for the inverse; `IsIso.comp_isIso' h1 (IsIso.comp_isIso' h2 ‚Ä¶)`
  (explicit-proof variant) for composites; `NatIso.isIso_map_iff (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp p a) c` for
  pullback-map-comp IsIso. `rw [hőĶ]` (counit = ūĚüô) misses when codomain carries a `(ūĚü≠ _).obj` wrapper ‚ÄĒ use
  `(eq_whisker hőĶ _).symm.trans h`. Inside the `Modules` namespace, bare `pullback` resolves to
  `Scheme.Modules.pullback` ‚ÄĒ spell `Limits.pullback` explicitly.
- **Unused-`[Field K]` generalization (iter-079, `chart_point_eq`).** When a `[Field K]` lemma in a file you
  may not edit never touches field structure in its proof, copy the statement+proof verbatim over an
  arbitrary `CommRing K` (e.g. `existence_chart_kpoint_eq` ‚Üí `chart_point_eq`).
- **Epi of free sheaves splits on affines via `tilde` + projectivity ‚ÄĒ the substitute for
  Mathlib's ABSENT `SheafOfModules` `Epi ‚Üí IsLocallySurjective` / module-sheaf stalk theory
  (iter-078, GR `chartLocus_isOpenCover`).** To split an epi `ŌÜ : free őĻ ‚Ü† free őļ` over `Spec R`:
  conjugate through `AlgebraicGeometry.tildeFinsupp : tilde (őĻ ‚Üí‚āÄ R) ‚ČÖ free őĻ`; the fully-faithful
  `tilde.functor` reflects the epi to `ModuleCat R` where epi = surjective
  (`ModuleCat.epi_iff_surjective`); `Module.projective_lifting_property` (free ‚áí projective) gives a
  module-level section; transport back through `tilde.map`. KEY defeq: `CommRingCat.of ‚Ü•R = R` is `rfl`,
  so `tildeFinsupp` applies literally over `(Spec R).ringCatSheaf`. Downstream matrix right-inverse:
  `exists_rightInverse_of_epi_matrixEndRect` (Spec) ‚Üí affine via `S.isoSpec` conjugation; the
  open-cover step needs `exists_isUnit_submatrix` (pure linear algebra: right-invertible matrix over a
  field has an invertible d-column minor ‚ÄĒ `Matrix.linearIndependent_cols_iff_isUnit` +
  `exists_linearIndependent` + basis cardinality), then `RingedSpace.isUnit_res_basicOpen` cuts the
  iso locus. This whole pipeline REPLACES the blueprint's stalkwise-Nakayama sketch on affines.
- **`asIso` deep in a long `‚Č™‚Čę` chain fails `IsIso` synthesis even with the `haveI` present ‚ÄĒ pass it
  EXPLICITLY (iter-078, SNAP `tensorObjAssoc`).** Inside a multi-segment iso composite, instance search
  runs in a metavariable-laden context and drops a `haveI`'d `IsIso` fact; use
  `@asIso _ _ _ _ f h` (h the explicit `IsIso` proof), never `asIso f` relying on synthesis. Companion
  (iter-078, `tensorPowAdd`): `MonoidalCategory.whiskerRightIso` with an ISO-valued first arg typed in
  `X.PresheafOfModules` breaks `(C := MonoidalPresheaf X)` unification ("failed to synthesize
  MonoidalCategory (MonoidalPresheaf X)"); rebuild as `Iso.mk` over the morphism-level
  `whiskerRight (C := MonoidalPresheaf X) ((toPresheafOfModules X).map e.hom)` with term-mode congruence
  identity proofs. `whiskerLeftIso` is fine (its first explicit arg is an object, not an iso).
  `include` directives must PRECEDE the docstring, not sit between docstring and `lemma` (else
  `unexpected token 'include'`).
- **Joint faithfulness of chart restrictions on a glued sheaf ‚ÄĒ `pullback_map_jointly_faithful`
  (iter-078, GlueDescent; the `lem:gr_modules_glue_unique` engine).** To prove `u = v` for two morphisms
  out of a `Scheme.Modules.glue` from `‚ąÄ i, őĻ_i^* u = őĻ_i^* v`: transfer pullback-agreement to
  `restrictFunctor` by `NatIso.naturality_2` conjugation, then `ext O x` +
  `TopCat.Sheaf.eq_of_locally_eq'` on the target's `Ab`-sheaf over the chart cover
  `{őĻ_i''(őĻ_i‚ĀĽ¬ĻO)}` (`D.őĻ_jointly_surjective`), with `mapPresheaf.naturality` moving the restriction
  inside the apps. This is the cancellation reduction lane-2 `tautologicalQuotient_epi` needs.

- **`Scheme.Hom.appTop (Y := Spec (CommRingCat.of ‚Ä¶))` named-arg ascription dissolves the
  őď(chart)/őď(Spec) print-identical defeq mismatch ‚ÄĒ closed the GR C2 base-change bridges (iter-064).**
  When a statement mixes `appTop` of a morphism into a chart-`def` (e.g. `chartOverlap`) with `őďSpecIso`
  terms, the two global-section objects are defeq but NOT syntactic, and `Matrix.map_map` /
  `rw [‚Üź Category.assoc]` / positional `rw [hp]` silently fail DOWNSTREAM. Pin the `Spec`-typed
  representation at the STATEMENT level with the `(Y := Spec (CommRingCat.of (Localization.Away ‚Ä¶)))`
  ascription on `appTop`. Companions: (i) `rw [hp]` on a composite under `appTop` still misses (comp-node
  instance mismatch) ‚ÄĒ transport via `refine (congrArg (fun m => őďSpecIso.inv ‚Čę appTop m) hp).trans ?_`;
  (ii) after a `simp` produces `‚Ü•(CommRingCat.of R)` vs `R` carrier mismatches, switch to a `calc` whose
  sub-goals are freshly elaborated; (iii) `simp only [RingHom.coe_comp, ‚Üź Matrix.map_map]` OVER-splits a
  fused `őė ‚ąė őĻR` and breaks the match with the Cramer cocycle L1 ‚ÄĒ split exactly the outer ŌÉ-layer;
  (iv) the matrix product recombines via bare `Matrix.map_mul.symm` (it is an equation, not a function).
- **Generic-context `glueLift` next to `glue` ‚ÄĒ `equalizer.lift` at the CONCRETE glued instantiation
  fails instance synthesis (iter-064, GR `tautologicalQuotient` skeleton).** Lifting a compatible family
  `k i : W ‚ü∂ (őĻ_i)_* M_i` into `Scheme.Modules.glue ‚Ä¶` by applying `equalizer.lift` at the concrete
  target fails `HasProduct`/`HasEqualizer` synth on the glue-unfolded beta-redex families (local `haveI`
  does not rescue). Build the lift as a GENERIC `def Scheme.Modules.glueLift` in the same elaboration
  environment as `glue` (where the instances resolve), via `equalizer.lift (Pi.lift k)` + `Pi.hom_ext` +
  `simp only [Category.assoc, Limits.Pi.lift_ŌÄ, Limits.Pi.lift_ŌÄ_assoc]`. GOTCHA: `limit.lift_ŌÄ` does
  NOT see through the `Pi.ŌÄ` def ‚ÄĒ use `Limits.Pi.lift_ŌÄ`/`Pi.lift_ŌÄ_assoc`.
- **`pullbackCongr` endpoint-cast collapse: generic `subst`-lemmas, then plain `rw` fires (iter-064,
  GR hom-level C2).** The `glueData_bridge_*` casts interleaved with free-pullback comparisons collapse
  via three generic lemmas (`pullbackFreeIso_inv_congr_hom`, `pullbackCongr_hom_app_free`,
  `pullbackFreeIso_inv_congr`: `Q_ŌÜ‚ĀĽ¬Ļ ‚Čę pullbackCongr(h).app(free) ‚Čę Q_Ōą = ūĚüô` etc.), each proved by
  `subst`+simp generic in the (equal) morphisms ‚ÄĒ the `pullbackFreeIso_trans_symm_eqToIso` discipline ‚ÄĒ
  so the kernel never whnfs a concrete immersion and the lemmas fire as ordinary `rw`s. The remaining
  matrixEnd fusion needs pure term-mode (`(Category.assoc _ _ _).symm.trans (congrArg (¬∑ ‚Čę Q.inv)
  ((matrixEnd_comp _ _).trans (congrArg matrixEnd hbridge))))` ‚ÄĒ `rw [reassoc_of% matrixEnd_comp]` hits
  mixed-provenance comp nodes and `rw [‚Üź Category.assoc]` grabs the scheme-level composite inside
  `pullbackFreeIso`'s argument. Budget `set_option maxHeartbeats 1600000` on the transport AND on the
  final `Iso.ext`-reduction (isDefEq/whnf cost of unifying inferred `.app _` instances across the
  diamond; kernel-validated at 40s cold build, no OOM).

- **`erw` bridges the `free`/`‚ąź` value-diamond; `rw [‚Üź coherence_legs]; rfl` closes long associativity-equal
  `SheafOfModules` composites ‚ÄĒ closed GR `matrixEnd_pullback` (a) + `pullbackBaseChangeTransport_matrixToFreeIso`
  (c-core), iter-063.** When a subterm sits under `(pullback p).map (‚Ä¶)` or involves `free (Fin d) = ‚ąź unit`,
  the displayed term is identical but elaborated in a defeq-but-not-syntactic object form: `rw`/`simp` miss
  `őĻFree_matrixEnd`/`Functor.map_comp`/`Functor.map_sum`/`Preadditive.comp_sum`/`Category.assoc`, but `erw`
  (defeq matching) fires. Per-entry matrix reduction: `reassoc_of% scalarEnd_pullback p (M k i)`. To distribute
  pullback over a `matrixEnd` row sum, reduce to one free injection with
  `Cofan.IsColimit.hom_ext (isColimitCofanMkObjOfIsColimit (pullback p) _ _ (SheafOfModules.isColimitFreeCofan (Fin d)))`
  + `simp only [cofan_mk_inj, Cofan.mk_pt]`; the cofan colimit needs `haveI := opensMap_final p` (Final instance).
